issue_title: Fix pull request count for repo widget
issue_body_preview:
Fix pull request count for a day, seven day and fourteen days. A pull request count should be aggregated.
resolves : https://github.com/Hygieia/Hygieia/issues/3181

The logic for commits count in repo widget is correct but it is incorrect for PR and issues -
https://github.com/Hygieia/Hygieia/bl
test_description_zh: 打开仪表盘页面，查看 Repo Widget 中 Pull Request 的统计数字，分别观察当天（1 day）、七天（7 days）和十四天（14 days）时间范围下 PR 数量的显示情况，验证数值是否为聚合累计值。
expected_result_zh: Repo Widget 中 Pull Request 数量在各时间范围（1天、7天、14天）下应显示正确的聚合累计数值，而非未聚合的原始数据或错误计数。
